violations.text: Allergen statement is lacking on menu. Allergen statement must be present on menu. Per PIC, allergy statement will be added when menus are re-printed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen ware washing area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025

The single cutting boards in the prep area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025
The 1 door freezer was observed with an accumulation of ice build-up. Establishment is to run a defrost on unit. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. PIC to send inspector proof. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024

The door to the outside, located in the ware washing area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
The dumpster area has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, and debris. The dumpster area must be maintained clean to prevent harborage for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the refuse area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024

The walls in the service area (behind refrigerator) are constructed of wood. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024

Raw animal foods (liquid eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (deli meat, vegetables) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024
Observed Chile to have a date that exceeds 7 days. PIC disposed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

The door to the outside, located in the ware washing area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
Sanitizer dispenser at 3 bay sink was not dispensing sanitizer at proper concentration. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

Bottles and personal belongings were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

Liquid eggs were observed held at 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC moved to ice bath. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024
Observed tuna to have a date that exceeded 7 days. PIC disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

Chicken was observed thawing on the counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

The door to the outside, located in the ware washing area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
Sanitizer dispenser at 3 bay sink was not dispensing sanitizer at proper concentration. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of red and brown residue. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the prep unit refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023
The (warewashing) handsink is lacking a hot water knob. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2023
